sentences.english: I do almost all my shopping online now.
sentences.korean: 이제 거의 모든 쇼핑을 온라인으로 해요.

sentences.english: It's so much easier than going to the store.
I prefer going to the store, actually.
I like to see and touch things before I buy them.
sentences.korean: 사기 전에 보고 만져보는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: I shop online too much, honestly.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 온라인 쇼핑을 너무 많이 해요.

sentences.english: I keep getting packages delivered and I can't even remember what I ordered.
sentences.korean: 택배가 계속 오는데 뭘 주문했는지도 기억이 안 나요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
